entries.reason: ENS base node ownership cannot be transferred to ephemeral test accounts on public forks; vm.store is required to exercise receiver flow.
entries.replacement_recommendation: Replace with delegated test-owned ENS test node when available.

entries.reason: Mainnet ENS receiver tests require simulated control of greengoods.eth without private-key ownership in CI.
entries.replacement_recommendation: Use a dedicated CI ENS node delegation path if introduced.
